commands.review_summary:
The PR removes the scheduled `vt-daily-rescan` cron from `convex/crons.ts` and adds a security-moderation spec note requiring future VT freshness jobs to be bounded or delta-driven.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection for the scheduler surface: current main registers `vt-daily-rescan` and the branch removes that registration. I did not reproduce the production starvation symptom from Convex runtime logs, so the operational impact remains source-plausible rather than fully reproduced.
commands.review_followup: This PR should stay in human review until runtime proof is added and maintainers accept the scanner freshness versus queue availability tradeoff.

target.title: fix: disable daily VT rescan
target.body:
## Summary
- remove the scheduled all-active `vt-daily-rescan` cron
- keep the internal `rescanActiveSkills` action available for manual use
- document that future VT freshness jobs must be bounded or delta-driven and must not starve publish-triggered ClawScan jobs

## Tests
- `bun run format:check -- convex/crons.ts specs/security-moderation.md`
- `bun run lint`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --reviewer codex --fallback-reviewer none`
target.author: patrick-erichsen

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
